#include <hexi/endian.h>

#include <cstdint>
#include <string>
#include <string_view>

struct MeasurementData {
    uint32_t sensor_id;
    uint32_t temperature_count; // added to store the count of temperatures
    std::vector<float> temperatures;
    double pressure;

    template<typename Adaptor>
    void serialise(Adaptor& adaptor) {
        if constexpr (Adaptor::is_writing) {
            // Serialization: convert to little-endian and write
            adaptor.write(sensor_id);
            // Convert the count to little-endian
            auto converted_count = hexi::endian::conditional_reverse<std::endian::native, std::endian::little>(temperature_count);
            adaptor.write(converted_count);
            for (auto& temp : temperatures) {
                auto converted_temp = hexi::endian::conditional_reverse<std::endian::native, std::endian::little>(temp);
                adaptor.write(converted_temp);
            }
            auto converted_pressure = hexi::endian::conditional_reverse<std::endian::native, std::endian::little>(pressure);
            adaptor.write(converted_pressure);
        } else {
            // Deserialization: read and then convert from little-endian to native
            adaptor.read(&sensor_id, 1);
            adaptor.read(&temperature_count, 1);
            temperatures.resize(temperature_count);

            for (auto& temp : temperatures) {
                adaptor.read(&temp, 1);
                hexi::endian::little_to_native_inplace(temp);
            }

            adaptor.read(&pressure, 1);
            hexi::endian::little_to_native_inplace(pressure);
        }
    }
};

std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_measurement_data(const MeasurementData& data) {
    std::vector<uint8_t> buffer;
    hexi::buffer_adaptor adaptor(buffer);
    hexi::binary_stream stream(adaptor);
    stream.serialise(data);
    return buffer;
}

MeasurementData deserialize_measurement_data(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    hexi::buffer_adaptor adaptor(buffer);
    hexi::binary_stream stream(adaptor);
    MeasurementData data;
    stream.deserialise(data);
    return data;
}

    std::string_view sensor_name;
};

    // Read the sensor_id
    stream.read(&info.sensor_id, 1);

    // Skip the remaining data
    stream.skip(buffer.size() - stream.total_read());

    return info;
}
